name: Lasagna Rolls with Tomato-Fennel
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat a large skillet with cooking spray. Place over medium heat until hot. Add garlic and sauté 2 minutes.
2. Add mushrooms, diced red pepper, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Cook over high heat for 8 minutes or until liquid evaporates, stirring constantly.
3. Combine mushroom mixture and crumbled tofu in a medium bowl. Stir well and set aside.
4. Wipe pan dry with a paper towel and coat with cooking spray.
5. Place over medium-high heat until hot. Add green onions and sauté 3 minutes.
6. Add fennel bulb, fennel seeds, black pepper, and salt. Cook for 3 minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add tomatoes and tomato paste; cook an additional 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
8. Spread 1 cup of the tomato mixture over the bottom of an 8-inch square baking dish.
9. Spread 1/3 cup of the mushroom mixture over each noodle. Sprinkle each with 3 tablespoons of cheese.
10. Roll up in a jellyroll fashion, beginning at the narrow end. Arrange rolls seam side down in the tomato mixture in the baking dish.
11. Spoon remaining 1 1/2 cups of tomato mixture over the rolls. Cover and bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
12. Uncover and bake an additional 10 minutes.
